# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: app-external-api-sa
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: app-external-api-sa
    displayName: App External API Service Account
- name: app-external-api-sa-key
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccountKey
  properties:
    parent: $(ref.app-external-api-sa.name)
    privateKeyType: TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE
    keyAlgorithm: KEY_ALG_RSA_2048
outputs:
- name: serviceAccountEmail
  value: $(ref.app-external-api-sa.email)
- name: serviceAccountName
  value: $(ref.app-external-api-sa.name)
- name: serviceAccountKeyName
  value: $(ref.app-external-api-sa-key.name)
- name: serviceAccountKeyPrivateKeyData
  value: $(ref.app-external-api-sa-key.privateKeyData)
